description: Verso: Scribal exercises in Arabic, extremely dense in distribution/paper usage. Medieval-era. At least two different scribal hands are visible. The Mishnaic commentary on the recto, per FGP, probably comrpises the initial statge of paper usage.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
